name: Syntrixa OpenClaw P2 n8n Workflow Architecture

parameters.content:
### Syntrixa OpenClaw P2 n8n Architecture
- OpenClaw has ZERO external access.
- n8n is the only external execution layer.
- OpenClaw returns structured request candidates only.
- n8n owns DB, memory, identity, communication, analytics, health checks, credentials, retries, audit, and infra.
- This workflow intentionally reuses shared utility nodes instead of duplicating logic across all P2 workflows.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ target_agent: $json.target_agent || $json.agent || "syntra", event_type: $json.event_type || $json.type || "n8n_packaged_event", priority: $json.priority || "normal", context_package: $json.context_package || $json, boundary: { openclaw_external_access: false, n8n_owns_execution: true } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
return items.map((item) => ({ json: {
  ...item.json,
  context_package: {
    package_id: item.json.id || $execution.id,
    source_workflow: item.json.current_workflow || $workflow.name,
    subject_refs: item.json.subject_refs || {},
    scopes: item.json.required_scopes || item.json.scopes || [item.json.workflow_category || item.json.category || 'workflow_state'],
    facts: item.json.facts || [],
    lead: item.json.lead || item.json.contact || undefined,
    contact: item.json.contact || item.json.payload?.contact || undefined,
    account: item.json.account || item.json.payload?.account || undefined,
    identity_context: item.json.identity_context || undefined,
    public_intelligence: item.json.public_intelligence || [],
    analytics_context: item.json.analytics_context || undefined,
    crm_context: item.json.crm_context || undefined,
    monitoring_context: item.json.monitoring_context || item.json.failure_context || undefined,
    workflow_state: item.json.workflow_state || {},
    lifecycle_state: item.json.lifecycle_state || {},
    knowledge_context: item.json.knowledge_context || [],
    constraints: { minimal_context: true, no_raw_secrets: true, retention: item.json.retention_hint || 'session' }
  }
}}));

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.audit_logs (request_id, workflow_name, category, requester, status, payload, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $6, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) RETURNING request_id, workflow_name, category, requester, status, payload, created_at;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.workflow_state WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;

nodes.name: WF009 Lead Qualification Context Retrieval Workflow

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $json.id, account: $json.account || $json.payload?.account, constraints: { no_raw_secrets: true, minimal_context: true } }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.identity_context WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.workflow_state WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(payload) FROM public.knowledge_index WHERE category = $3), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: $json.agent || $json.requester?.id || "n8n", message: $json.message || $json.summary || $json.workflow_step_detail || "n8n published dashboard event", tone: $json.tone || "cyan", source_workflow: $workflow.name, execution_id: $execution.id, candidate_type: $json.type, category: $json.category, status: $json.status || "published" }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.working_memory WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;

INSERT INTO public.working_memory (request_id, category, payload, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $3, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id) DO UPDATE SET category = EXCLUDED.category, payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING request_id, category, payload, updated_at;
INSERT INTO public.long_memory (request_id, category, payload, created_at) VALUES ($1, $3, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) RETURNING request_id, category, payload, created_at;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.private_memory WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;

INSERT INTO public.private_memory (request_id, category, payload, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $3, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id) DO UPDATE SET category = EXCLUDED.category, payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING request_id, category, payload, updated_at;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.shared_memory WHERE category = $3), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;

INSERT INTO public.shared_memory (category, payload, updated_at) VALUES ($3, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (category) DO UPDATE SET payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING category, payload, updated_at;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.identity_context WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(payload) FROM public.knowledge_index WHERE category = $3), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;
SELECT $1 AS request_id, $2 AS workflow_name, COALESCE((SELECT payload FROM public.workflow_state WHERE request_id = $1), CAST($5 AS jsonb)) AS payload;

INSERT INTO public.lifecycle_state (request_id, workflow_name, payload, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (request_id) DO UPDATE SET workflow_name = EXCLUDED.workflow_name, payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING request_id, workflow_name, payload, updated_at;
INSERT INTO public.agent_handoffs (request_id, requester, payload, created_at) VALUES ($1, $4, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) RETURNING request_id, requester, payload, created_at;
INSERT INTO public.observability_events (request_id, category, payload, created_at) VALUES ($1, $3, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) RETURNING request_id, category, payload, created_at;

INSERT INTO public.workflow_logs (request_id, workflow_name, status, payload, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $6, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) RETURNING request_id, workflow_name, status, payload, created_at;

INSERT INTO public.audit_logs (request_id, workflow_name, category, requester, status, payload, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $6, CAST($5 AS jsonb), NOW()) RETURNING request_id, workflow_name, category, requester, status, payload, created_at;

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => ({ json: { ...item.json, status: 'ERROR_RETRY_REVIEW', retry_owned_by: 'n8n', current_workflow: 'UTIL021 Shared Retry and Corrective Action Handler' } }));

nodes.name: UTIL021 Shared Retry and Corrective Action Handler

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ items: $json.result?.n8n_request_candidates || $json.n8n_request_candidates || [], source_agent_result: { agent: $json.result?.agent || $json.agent, event_type: $json.result?.event_type || $json.event_type, classification: $json.result?.classification || $json.classification, confidence: $json.result?.confidence || $json.confidence }, execution_id: $execution.id, workflow: $workflow.name }) }}
